decisions.name: Does_Current_Fulfillment_Policy_Match_Requirement
decisions.label: Does Current Fulfillment Policy Match Requirement

decisions.name: Has_Fulfillment_Policy_Key_To_Collect
decisions.label: Has Fulfillment Policy Key To Collect

decisions.name: Has_Fulfillment_Policy_Keys_To_Get
decisions.label: Has Fulfillment Policy Keys To Get

Flow.description: DOMAIN LAYER - OmniSObject - Subflow - CREATE - Onboarding Requirement Subjects

formulas.name: MissingFulfillmentPolicyErrorMessage
formulas.expression: "No active fulfillment policy was found for Onboarding Requirement " & {!Loop_Onboarding_Requirements.Id} & " with Fulfillment_Policy_Key__c = " & {!ResolvedFulfillmentPolicyKey} & "."

formulas.name: UnsupportedSubjectModelErrorMessage
formulas.expression: "Unsupported subject model " & TEXT({!FulfillmentPolicyRecord.Subject_Model__c}) & " for Onboarding Requirement " & {!Loop_Onboarding_Requirements.Id} & " with Fulfillment_Policy_Key__c = " & {!ResolvedFulfillmentPolicyKey} & "."

Flow.interviewLabel: DOMAIN - OmniSObject - SFL - CREATE - Onboarding Requirement Subjects {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: DOMAIN - OmniSObject - SFL - CREATE - Onboarding Requirement Subjects

loops.name: Loop_Onboarding_Requirements_for_Fulfillment_Policy_Keys
loops.label: Loop Onboarding Requirements for Fulfillment Policy Keys

subflows.name: Handle_Create_Onboarding_Requirement_Subjects_Fault
subflows.label: Handle Create Onboarding Requirement Subjects Fault

value.stringValue: Unsupported onboarding fulfillment policy subject model.
